structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-11-18 NOVA Aligns with Fannie Mae FICO Policy Change
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-11-18 08:44:04-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Last week, Fannie Mae released an announcement stating that minimum credit score requirements will no longer apply to loan casefiles submitted to DU. NOVA has made the decision to align with this update with no additional overlays. PennyMac has also announced that they will follow Fannie Mae’s new guidance, and we expect additional aggregators to communicate their positions in the coming weeks.

 

Effective immediately, loans with any borrower FICO score(s) may be locked with NOVA as long as DU findings reflect Approve/Eligible.

 

Please note that Mortgage Insurance requirements still apply, and MI company overlays must be considered. At this time, Essent is the only MI company that has published guidance on this update, and they have implemented a 600 minimum FICO overlay. We will relay updates from other MI companies as their announcements are released.

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	This change applies to loan casefiles submitted or resubmitted on or after Nov. 15, 2025.
*	Fannie Mae’s LLPA matrices (attached) will apply
*	Reach out to the Marketing Team for customized graphics.

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Previous NOVA Capital Markets Announcement
*	Essent MI Announcement
*	Fannie Mae LLPA Matrix

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
